tests.name: Critical Cardiac
tests.description: HR=150, Temp=104°F (40°C), BP 80/50, O₂=85 → should be ESI 1-2

tests.name: Moderate Respiratory
tests.description: HR=100, Temp=101°F (38.3°C), BP 130/85, O₂=93 → should be ESI 2-3

tests.name: Mild Stable
tests.description: HR=72, Temp=98.6°F (36.5°C), normal BP, O₂=99 → should be ESI 4-5

tests.name: Elderly Critical
tests.description: Age=85, HR=40 (bradycardia), Temp=95°F (35°C), O₂=82 → should be ESI 1-2

tests.name: Young Healthy
tests.description: Age=20, all vitals normal → should be ESI 4-5

tests.name: Edge: Minimal Input
tests.description: Only age and sex, rest defaults → should not crash
